<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f7f8fb"/>

  <!-- Winding path -->
  <path d="M 70 345 C 135 385 155 315 215 315 C 270 315 245 270 290 260 C 340 250 345 200 445 175" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95"/>
  <path d="M 70 345 C 135 385 155 315 215 315 C 270 315 245 270 290 260 C 340 250 345 200 445 175" fill="none" stroke="#1d4ed8" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- Footprints along the path (no text) -->
  <g fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.35)" stroke="rgba(120,70,20,0.65)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <!-- 1 -->
    <g transform="translate(110 372) rotate(-10)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="8" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 2 -->
    <g transform="translate(175 338) rotate(-20)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="24" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 3 -->
    <g transform="translate(220 316) rotate(0)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="25" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="11" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 4 -->
    <g transform="translate(275 287) rotate(15)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="24" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 5 -->
    <g transform="translate(312 262) rotate(25)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="25" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="11" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 6 -->
    <g transform="translate(365 225) rotate(35)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="24" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 7 -->
    <g transform="translate(432 178) rotate(40)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="9" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- A small wandering arrow/compass-like marker (still no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(445 175)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="22" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.14)" stroke="rgba(29,78,216,0.35)" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M 0 -18 L 6 0 L 0 18 L -6 0 Z" fill="rgba(29,78,216,0.85)"/>
    <path d="M -4 -2 C -1 -10 1 -10 4 -2" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.55)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f7f8fb"/>

  <!-- Winding path -->
  <path d="M 70 345 C 135 385 155 315 215 315 C 270 315 245 270 290 260 C 340 250 345 200 445 175" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95"/>
  <path d="M 70 345 C 135 385 155 315 215 315 C 270 315 245 270 290 260 C 340 250 345 200 445 175" fill="none" stroke="#1d4ed8" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- Footprints along the path (no text) -->
  <g fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.35)" stroke="rgba(120,70,20,0.65)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <!-- 1 -->
    <g transform="translate(110 372) rotate(-10)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="10"/>
      <ellipse cx="8" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 2 -->
    <g transform="translate(175 338) rotate(-20)">

      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 3 -->
    <g transform="translate(220 316) rotate(0)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="25" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="11" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 4 -->
    <g transform="translate(275 287) rotate(15)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="24" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 5 -->
    <g transform="translate(312 262) rotate(25)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="25" ry="11"/>
      <ellipse cx="11" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 6 -->
    <g transform="translate(365 225) rotate(35)">

      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>

    <!-- 7 -->

      <ellipse cx="9" cy="-1" rx="10" ry="6" fill="rgba(120,70,20,0.20)" stroke="none"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- A small wandering arrow/compass-like marker (still no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(445 175)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="22" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.14)" stroke="rgba(29,78,216,0.35)" stroke-width="3"/>

    <path d="M -4 -2 C -1 -10 1 -10 4 -2" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.55)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Designing a "Wander" Concept**

I’m focusing on illustrating the concept of "wander" without using any text. A winding path with footprints or a small compass arrow could effectively convey this idea. I’m thinking of using a thick line for the path with dot footprints as semicircles, adding a small globe circle too. The winding path will be structured as a cubic Bezier curve, and I plan to position six footprints along the curve using specific coordinates. It’ll be a light background for clarity.**Creating Footprint SVG**

I’m designing an SVG that features footprints represented as ellipses with slight rotations and small toes, while also keeping it simple by avoiding any foreign objects. I’m considering adding a small compass needle, but maybe it’s not necessary. The background will be white, and I'll use a stroke color like #4B6CB7 or brown for the path. The footprints will use two ellipses, with the sole having a specific rgba fill, keeping everything inline without labels or text. Finally, I’ll return the whole SVG as a single JSON string.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
